items.title: This common amino acid helped mice survive deadly inflammation

items.title: Why cancer spreads more in middle age than in old age
items.summary: Melanoma may not become steadily more dangerous with age as scientists once assumed. In a surprising discovery, researchers found that cancer spread was lowest in young mice, surged in middle-aged mice, and then dropped again in very old mice.
